name: Moroccan Garbanzo Beans with Raisins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions and garlic in oil in a 3-quart saucepan, stirring frequently until tender, about 7 minutes.
2. Add the remaining ingredients except garbanzo beans and rice. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and cover. Cook until the squash is tender, about 8 minutes (acorn squash may also be used).
4. Stir in the garbanzo beans.
5. Serve over rice.
